title: Aureline semantic-readiness parity failure codes
description: Schema for semantic-readiness parity and export narrowing failures. These records are designed to be emitted by parity audits and by support/migration/recovery tooling when a surface cannot preserve the semantic-readiness parity floor. Failure codes are stable and portable across desktop UI, headless/CLI output, migration reports, recovery packets, and support exports. The codes here do not redefine the semantic-readiness vocabulary itself; they describe when a surface failed to preserve or honestly narrow that vocabulary.

semantic_readiness_failure_schema_versio.description: Schema version for this failure-code record set.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the failure record payload.

surface_id.description: Surface family emitting the failure item.

severity.description: Severity class used by audits and support tooling.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable identifier safe to log and export.

fixture_ref.description: Repo-relative fixture path the failure refers to.

subject_ref.description: Optional stable subject reference (view_id, logical uri, or equivalent).

presentation_uri.description: Presentation URI evidence when path truth differs from canonical truth.

canonical_uri.description: Canonical URI evidence when path truth differs from canonical truth.

evidence_refs.description: Optional file refs supporting the failure diagnosis.

semantic_readiness_failure_record.description: Failure item emitted when a surface cannot preserve readiness parity or must narrow at export time.
